name: 7'x10' Marina Striped Wool/Cotton Area Rug Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Handmade Flat Pile Carpet
description:
Add casual-chic stripes to your flooring with this Cream Marina Striped Wool Cotton Area Rug from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This handmade area rug is a great indoor accent. It showcases a woven striped pattern in cream and beige colors for a casual textured appeal. The wool and cotton construction adds comfort and warmth to your flooring for a great feel underfoot. Plus, it has a flat pile height that's perfect for frequently used areas like your living room.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.
